title: Glasslung
text: Your breath rasps through crystal dust and old ward smoke.
flavor: Cold air leaves a violet frost on your teeth.
trigger: When you enter an inner space or a space with anomaly text.
penalty: Gain 1 Heat from the bad air.
relief: Discard a consumable salvage item to treat the breath and ignore this trigger once.
upside: After resolving the space, you may lose 1 Heat if you did not fail a check there.
